title: Hunting Dark Matter with the Einstein Telescope
summary: Too light primordial black holes evaporate and are therefore strongly constrained by various bounds, e.g. Cosmic Microwave Background distortion. However, if they are formed strongly clustered, the corresponding haloes may collapse in heavier black holes which may form the entirety of the dark matter of the universe. The indirect signal of such scenario is the production of a flat stochastic background of gravitational waves which is detectable by the Einstein Telescope.

AI.tldr: 太轻的原初黑洞会蒸发，因此受到各种限制（如宇宙微波背景畸变）。但如果它们形成时高度聚集，相应的晕可能坍缩成更重的黑洞，从而构成宇宙的全部暗物质。这种情景的间接信号是产生平坦的随机引力波背景，可被爱因斯坦望远镜探测到。
AI.motivation: 解决太轻的原初黑洞会蒸发而被限制的问题，探索通过聚集形成更重黑洞来构成暗物质的可能性，并寻找可观测的引力波信号。
AI.method: 提出原初黑洞形成时高度聚集的机制，使相应的晕坍缩成更重的黑洞，分析这种情景产生的平坦随机引力波背景特征。
AI.result: 高度聚集的原初黑洞晕可以坍缩形成更重的黑洞，这些黑洞可能构成宇宙的全部暗物质，并产生可被爱因斯坦望远镜探测的平坦随机引力波背景。
AI.conclusion: 通过原初黑洞聚集形成更重黑洞的机制，不仅解决了轻黑洞蒸发的问题，还提供了暗物质候选者，并给出了可通过未来引力波探测器验证的可观测信号。

title: PANORAMIC: The Dawn of Massive Quiescent Galaxies I. Number Density and Cosmic Variance from 1000 arcmin$^2$ NIRCam Imaging
summary: We measure the number density and field-to-field variance of massive quiescent galaxies at $z\sim3$ - 8 using the JWST/NIRCam pure-parallel imaging survey PANORAMIC together with archival observations, covering an area of 0.28 deg$^2$ ($\sim1000$ arcmin$^2$) in at least six filters. We identify quiescent galaxy candidates at $z\gtrsim3$ with $M_\ast \gtrsim 10^{10}\,M_\odot$, comprising 101 galaxies in a gold sample of high-confidence candidates and 137 in a more inclusive silver sample. We measure their evolving comoving number density, finding $(1.5$ vs. $3.1)\times10^{-5}\,\mathrm{Mpc}^{-3}$ at $z=3$ - 4 for the gold and silver samples, respectively, and a decline by more than a factor of 20 by $z\sim6$. Comparisons with empirical models and cosmological simulations show that widely used frameworks underpredict the abundance of massive quiescent galaxies at $z\gtrsim4$ by $\gtrsim1$ dex, indicating that current implementations of early star formation, feedback, and quenching do not produce enough early quenched systems. With 34 independent sightlines, we present the first direct empirical measurement of field-to-field variance for quiescent galaxies at $z>3$, finding a high cosmic variance of $σ_{\rm CV}\approx0.7\pm0.3$. This exceeds predictions from abundance-matched mock catalogs, suggesting that early quiescent galaxies are more strongly clustered, and more likely to be found near one another or in more biased regions, than expected in current galaxy-formation models. Any successful model for the emergence of early massive quiescent galaxies must reproduce both their abundance evolution and their imprint on the large-scale distribution.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST/NIRCam巡天数据在红移3-8范围内发现大量大质量静止星系，其丰度远超现有模型预测，且宇宙方差显著高于预期。
AI.motivation: 研究早期宇宙中大质量静止星系的形成和演化，检验现有星系形成模型对高红移静止星系丰度和分布的预测能力。
AI.method: 使用JWST/NIRCam并行巡天数据（PANORAMIC）结合档案观测，覆盖0.28平方度区域，通过至少6个滤光片识别红移z≥3、质量M*≥10¹⁰M⊙的静止星系候选体。
AI.result: 在红移3-4处发现静止星系数密度为(1.5-3.1)×10⁻⁵ Mpc⁻³，到z∼6时下降超过20倍；其丰度比现有模型预测高约1个数量级；首次直接测量到高红移静止星系的高宇宙方差（σ_CV≈0.7±0.3）。
AI.conclusion: 现有星系形成模型严重低估早期大质量静止星系的丰度和聚类程度，表明早期恒星形成、反馈和淬灭机制需要重新审视，成功模型必须同时再现其丰度演化和大尺度分布特征。

title: One sightline, many systems: a FLASH discovery of HI towards scintillating quasar PKS 0405-385
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures and 1 table. Accepted for publication in PASA
summary: We report the discovery of an intervening 21\,cm absorption line at z = 0.882 towards the z = 1.284 quasar PKS 0405-385, identified in the First Large Absorption Survey in HI (FLASH). This quasar once displayed the most rapid known intraday variability at radio frequencies, from which it earned the title of `the smallest radio quasar'. Although its size was revised upwards soon after based on updated scattering theory, PKS 0405-385 remains an important probe of Galactic plasma, and now also of intervening gas discovered through HI absorption. We present new long-slit spectroscopy spanning both PKS 0405-385 and the candidate host of the intervening HI gas. We identify MgII and FeII absorption lines in this spectrum consistent with the redshift of the intervening HI, as well as two additional, independent metal-line systems at z = 0.907 and z = 0.966, but we cannot accurately pinpoint the host(s) of this intervening gas in current data. We revisit the radio variability of PKS 0405-385 in light of advances in scintillation theory, as well as extended monitoring with the Australia Telescope Compact Array and the Australian SKA Pathfinder, and find a revised linear size >0.3 pc, but no new evidence of repeating intraday variability.

AI.tldr: 在z=1.284类星体PKS 0405-385方向发现z=0.882的21厘米吸收线，重新评估了该源的大小和变异性
AI.motivation: 研究PKS 0405-385类星体的星际介质吸收特征，特别是新发现的21厘米吸收线，同时重新评估该源的射电变异性特征
AI.method: 使用FLASH巡天数据识别21厘米吸收线，进行长缝光谱观测分析金属吸收线，结合澳大利亚望远镜致密阵列和ASKAP的长期监测数据重新评估射电变异性
AI.result: 发现z=0.882的21厘米吸收线，确认了MgII和FeII金属吸收线，发现两个额外的金属线系统(z=0.907和z=0.966)，修订了PKS 0405-385的线性尺寸>0.3 pc，未发现新的重复日内变异性证据
AI.conclusion: PKS 0405-385不仅是研究银河系等离子体的重要探针，现在也成为研究星际气体吸收的重要目标，其尺寸比最初估计的要大，但仍然是紧凑的射电源

title: Stellar Population Characterisations in nearby, dusty Early-Type Galaxies
comment: 19 pages, 11 figues, 5 tables. Accepted for publication in MNRAS. Supplementary Material available upon publication
summary: Dust in Early-Type galaxies (ETGs) may originate from internal or external sources. In this paper we study the stellar populations of particularly dusty ETGs to search for evidence of the dust's origin. Using the Southern African Large Telescope (SALT), we obtained long-slit optical spectra within the effective radius (R_e), along the major axis of 15 nearby ETGs, selected from the GAMA and Herschel-ATLAS surveys for their high levels of interstellar dust. Using full spectrum fitting and Lick index fitting we analysed their major axis kinematics and stellar population characteristics. We used stellar population models from the newly developed sMILES library and from the empirical MILES library. Kinematic results show that most of our sample of dusty ETGs are rotationally supported and there are no detectable kinematic discontinuities. 12 of our sample of 15 dusty ETGs show evidence of young/intermediate age stellar population components suggesting ongoing/recent star formation. Using simulations, we show that these recent ($\approx$1~Gyr) populations are not artefacts of the fitting process or data. As a check with a control sample we use stacked SDSS spectra and find that dusty ETGs show a component with intermediate age, whereas non-dusty ETGs do not. Age, metallicity and $α$-element abundance ratio increase with increasing central velocity dispersion in the SALT spectra, as seen in previous studies of ETGs, but with larger scatter in our sample. Given our stellar population findings, we discuss formation scenarios that might cause or rule out a high dust/molecular gas content.

AI.tldr: 研究通过光谱分析发现，早期型星系中的尘埃可能源于内部恒星形成活动，而非外部来源
AI.motivation: 探索早期型星系中尘埃的来源（内部或外部），通过分析特别多尘的早期型星系的恒星种群特征来寻找证据
AI.method: 使用南非大望远镜获取15个多尘早期型星系的有效半径内长缝光谱，通过全光谱拟合和Lick指数拟合分析其运动学和恒星种群特征，使用sMILES和MILES恒星种群模型库，并与对照样本（SDSS叠加光谱）进行比较
AI.result: 大多数多尘早期型星系是旋转支撑的，没有可检测的运动学不连续性；15个样本中有12个显示年轻/中间年龄恒星种群成分，表明正在进行/最近的恒星形成；多尘星系显示中间年龄成分，而非多尘星系则没有；年龄、金属丰度和α元素丰度比随中心速度弥散增加而增加
AI.conclusion: 多尘早期型星系中的尘埃很可能源于内部恒星形成活动，而非外部吸积，这与星系形成演化模型一致

title: Identifying signatures of inflow onto face-on galaxies using the Balmer decrement
summary: Isolated star-forming galaxies require inflows of fresh gas from the surrounding medium to sustain episodes of star formation over time. However, there are very few direct detections of accretion onto external galaxies. Studies in absorption can only observe along limited sightlines, while those in emission can have difficulty distinguishing inflowing gas in the foreground of the galactic disk from similarly Doppler-shifted outflowing gas in the background. We explore the possibility of using the Balmer decrement (H$α$/H$β$) in low-inclination systems as a diagnostic for disentangling the flow geometry in disk-like galaxies. We leverage mock spatial-spectral observations of an isolated Milky Way-mass galaxy simulated using the radiation-hydrodynamics code AREPO-RT and post-processed with the Monte Carlo radiative transfer code COLT. We find that gas components located in front of the disk exhibit systematically lower Balmer decrements than gas embedded in or behind the disk, with a mean front-back offset of $Δ(\text{H}α/\text{H}β) \approx -0.14$. The ability to differentiate between the disk and far-side components is limited by the extremely clumpy, multiphase dust distribution along the line of sight introducing substantial scatter. Overall, the results provide a useful observational diagnostic of inflow and outflow in dusty face-on galaxies.

AI.tldr: 利用巴尔末减光比(Hα/Hβ)作为诊断工具，区分低倾角星系中气体流入和流出的几何结构
AI.motivation: 孤立恒星形成星系需要从周围介质中持续吸入新鲜气体以维持长期恒星形成，但目前对星系吸积过程的直接观测非常有限。吸收线研究只能沿有限视线观测，而发射线研究难以区分星系盘前景的流入气体和背景中具有相似多普勒频移的流出气体。
AI.method: 利用辐射流体动力学代码AREPO-RT模拟孤立银河系质量星系，并通过蒙特卡洛辐射传输代码COLT进行后处理，生成模拟空间-光谱观测数据。研究低倾角系统中巴尔末减光比(Hα/Hβ)作为区分气体流动几何结构的诊断工具。
AI.result: 位于星系盘前方的气体组分显示出比嵌入盘内或盘后气体更低的巴尔末减光比，平均前后偏移量Δ(Hα/Hβ)≈-0.14。但由于视线方向上极端团块状、多相尘埃分布引入显著散射，区分盘和远侧组分的能力有限。
AI.conclusion: 巴尔末减光比可作为观测多尘埃面朝星系中气体流入和流出的有用诊断工具，为理解星系气体吸积过程提供新方法。

title: Lyman-$α$ Forest Signatures of Mixed Fuzzy and Cold Dark Matter
summary:
We investigate Lyman-alpha forest flux statistics in mixed fuzzy dark matter (FDM) and cold dark matter (CDM) cosmologies using the Fluctuating Gunn-Peterson Approximation (FGPA) applied to hybrid Schrödinger-Poisson and N-body simulations. We evolve the dark matter distribution from z = 120 to z = 2 for an axion mass ( m_22 = 0.01) and FDM fraction (f_A = 0.1), and compare two realizations with identical initial conditions: one evolved with a particle-only approximation and one with full wave--mechanical dynamics.
  We find that, despite near-degeneracy in the nonlinear matter power spectrum, the corresponding Ly α flux power spectra differ at the 10 percent level on intermediate scales. This discrepancy arises from a strong suppression of small-scale velocity power in the Schrödinger--Poisson evolution, which is not captured by N-body treatments with matched initial transfer functions. As a result, the flux statistics cannot be fully characterized by the matter power spectrum alone, but depend sensitively on the dynamical evolution of the velocity field. These results demonstrate that wave-mechanical effects in FDM leave distinct kinematic imprints in Ly α observables beyond those associated with initial-condition suppression. While our analysis is based on an idealized FGPA framework, it isolates a mechanism by which mixed dark matter models can break degeneracies present in standard structure-based probes, motivating further investigation with full hydrodynamical simulations.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过混合薛定谔-泊松和N体模拟，发现模糊暗物质（FDM）与冷暗物质（CDM）混合宇宙学中，尽管非线性物质功率谱近乎简并，但莱曼α森林通量功率谱在中等尺度上存在10%差异，这源于波动力学演化对小尺度速度功率的强烈抑制。
AI.motivation: 研究模糊暗物质（FDM）与冷暗物质（CDM）混合宇宙学模型，探索波动力学效应在莱曼α森林观测中的独特印记，突破传统结构探测中存在的简并性问题。
AI.method: 使用混合薛定谔-泊松和N体模拟，应用波动Gunn-Peterson近似（FGPA）分析莱曼α森林通量统计。从z=120演化到z=2，针对轴子质量m_22=0.01和FDM分数f_A=0.1，比较两种实现：粒子近似演化和完整波动力学演化。
AI.result: 尽管非线性物质功率谱近乎简并，但对应的莱曼α通量功率谱在中等尺度上存在10%差异。这种差异源于薛定谔-泊松演化对小尺度速度功率的强烈抑制，而匹配初始传递函数的N体处理无法捕捉这一效应。
AI.conclusion: 通量统计不能仅由物质功率谱完全表征，而敏感依赖于速度场的动力学演化。FDM中的波动力学效应在莱曼α观测中留下独特的运动学印记，超越了初始条件抑制相关的效应。混合暗物质模型能够打破标准结构探测中的简并性，值得进一步进行完整流体动力学模拟研究。

title: Great Walls of Cosmic Baryons in the Northern Sky
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, 1 table, submitted to ApJ Letters
summary: The dispersion measures (DMs) of fast radio bursts (FRBs) encode the total ionized-gas column densities along their sightlines. Most observed FRBs originate at distances where the cosmological principle applies. Thus, variations in the DM distribution of FRBs observed in different regions on the sky trace local sources of anisotropy, such as the warm ionized medium and circum-galactic medium of the Milky Way, and local large-scale structure. We present a map of extragalactic DM variations across the Northern sky using a few thousand FRBs from the second \chime{} catalog. We detect a $\gtrsim 4σ$ excess of $\sim$150 pc cm$^{-3}$ above the global mean, extended over $\sim$30$^\circ$ scales and centered near $α\approx$ $12^{\rm h}$, $δ\approx$ $55^\circ$. This excess, termed Wall 1, is robust to variations in sample selection and jackknife resampling, and cannot be explained by Galactic-disk DM-model uncertainties. The excess is likely too large to correspond to anisotropy in the Milky Way halo. The signal spatially coincides with the Ursa Major supercluster and associated large-scale structures. A secondary, more tentative Wall 2 near $α\approx 2^{\rm h}$, $δ\approx$ $45^\circ$ is spatially coincident with the Perseus-Pisces supercluster. Although the spatial coincidences suggest that the Walls may correspond to baryons in the local large-scale structure, the probability of chance coincidence is likely too high ($\sim10-20\%$) to claim confident associations. These results highlight the potential of using FRB DMs to detect baryon overdensities associated with local large-scale structure, and have important implications for near-field baryon mapping and FRB cosmology.

AI.tldr: 利用CHIME第二目录中数千个快速射电暴的色散测量数据，绘制了北天区河外DM变化图，检测到两个可能与本地大尺度结构相关的电离气体过密度区域。
AI.motivation: 快速射电暴的色散测量（DM）包含视线方向上电离气体柱密度的信息。由于大多数FRB起源于宇宙学距离，其DM分布的变化可以追踪局部各向异性源，如银河系暖电离介质、星系际介质以及本地大尺度结构。本研究旨在利用FRB DM数据探测与本地大尺度结构相关的重子过密度。
AI.method: 使用CHIME第二目录中的数千个快速射电暴数据，绘制北天区河外DM变化图。通过统计分析检测DM异常区域，并进行样本选择变化和jackknife重采样验证结果的稳健性。排除银河系盘DM模型不确定性的影响，分析信号的空间分布特征。
AI.result: 在北天区检测到两个显著的DM异常区域：Wall 1（α≈12h，δ≈55°）显示出≥4σ的显著性，DM值比全局平均值高出约150 pc cm⁻³，延伸尺度约30°，空间位置与大熊座超星系团相关；Wall 2（α≈2h，δ≈45°）为更初步的探测，空间位置与英仙-双鱼超星系团重合。虽然空间位置暗示这些"墙"可能对应本地大尺度结构中的重子，但偶然重合概率约为10-20%，尚不能确定关联。
AI.conclusion: 研究展示了利用FRB DM数据探测与本地大尺度结构相关的重子过密度的潜力。这些结果对近场重子测绘和FRB宇宙学具有重要意义，为理解宇宙中重子分布提供了新方法。虽然检测到的信号与已知超星系团空间位置重合，但需要更多数据来确认这些关联的统计显著性。
